title: Drug
description: Schema for a single drug entry in the drug interaction alert system

drugId.description: Unique identifier for the drug; used as the hash map key for O(1) retrieval

genericName.description: Generic (non-proprietary) name of the drug; inserted into the trie for autocomplete

brandNames.description: List of brand names; each is also inserted into the trie for autocomplete

drugClass.description: Pharmacological class and subclass of the drug

description.description: Plain-language clinical summary of the drug's mechanism and primary uses

warnings.description: List of clinically significant warnings associated with this drug

drugId.description: drugId of the interacting drug; resolves to a full drug record via hash map

genericName.description: Generic name of the interacting drug; denormalized for readability

description.description: Clinical explanation of the interaction mechanism and risk

allergyConflicts.description: List of allergens that conflict with this drug

allergen.description: Name of the allergen (drug name, drug class, or excipient)

description.description: Clinical explanation of the allergy conflict

conditionConflicts.description: List of medical conditions that conflict with this drug

description.description: Clinical explanation of why this condition conflicts with the drug

dietaryConflicts.description: List of dietary items that conflict with this drug; can be empty array if none exist

item.description: Dietary item, food group, or substance (e.g. alcohol, grapefruit, dairy)

description.description: Clinical explanation of the dietary interaction
